50.reason: [The traversal logic in 'visit' is incorrect: it only traverses the right child when the left child is NULL, but a node may have both children and still not be a leaf. This causes missing some leaf nodes and incorrect left-to-right order. It should recursively visit both children regardless, and only print when both children are NULL.]
